title: Table-in-out passthrough: example.echo((SELECT ... FROM range(N)))
description: Streams rows into the worker and back unchanged. Measures bidirectional round-trip cost.
setup_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP TABLE bench_input AS SELECT ${payload_expr} FROM range(${param:rows}) t(i);

payload.schema_in: BIGINT v (when payload<=8) or VARCHAR v (when payload>8)
payload.notes: Echo passthrough; per-row size matches payload_bytes param.

notes: payload_expr placeholder: <=8 bytes uses BIGINT i; otherwise repeat('x', N). Default TableInOutGenerator is parallel-capable (no @init_single_worker).
